findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp-public?vertical=finance" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_cfpb_complaint_intelligence, get_ncua_credit_union_financials, get_sec_insider_trading, get_sec_beneficial_ownership, get_job_openings_intelligence, get_employment_cost_index, get_producer_price_by_industry, get_agricultural_commodity_benchmark, get_shipping_cost_benchmark, get_retail_sales_benchmark, get_personal_savings_benchmark, get_copper_price_benchmark · Private data: get_cfpb_complaint_intelligence, get_public_market_multiples, get_pe_return_benchmark, get_venture_benchmark · Public sink: get_trader_signals, get_sec_insider_trading, get_sec_beneficial_ownership, get_job_openings_intelligence, get_employment_cost_index, get_producer_price_by_industry, get_agricultural_commodity_benchmark, get_shipping_cost_benchmark, get_retail_sales_benchmark, get_personal_savings_benchmark, get_copper_price_benchmark · Destructive: get_personal_savings_benchmark.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_cfpb_complaint_intelligence, get_ncua_credit_union_financials, get_sec_insider_trading, get_sec_beneficial_ownership, get_job_openings_intelligence, get_employment_cost_index, get_producer_price_by_industry, get_agricultural_commodity_benchmark, get_shipping_cost_benchmark, get_retail_sales_benchmark, get_personal_savings_benchmark, get_copper_price_benchmark · Private data: get_cfpb_complaint_intelligence, get_public_market_multiples, get_pe_return_benchmark, get_venture_benchmark · Public sink: get_trader_signals, get_sec_insider_trading, get_sec_beneficial_ownership, get_job_openings_intelligence, get_employment_cost_index, get_producer_price_by_industry, get_agricultural_commodity_benchmark, get_shipping_cost_benchmark, get_retail_sales_benchmark, get_personal_savings_benchmark, get_copper_price_benchmark · Destructive: get_personal_savings_benchmark

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
